title: strychnos leenhoutsii
intro: Strychnos leenhoutsii is a species of plant in the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as a poisonous tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its alkaloids have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos leenhoutsii include its use as an antimalarial agent and its potential in treating fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. In herbal preparations, Strychnos leenhoutsii is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, but its use requires caution due to its toxic alkaloids.
